title: Vanguard Agent Identity Registry Profile
description: Cryptographic and operational metadata for certified PAN Vanguard Agents.

tpm_public_key.description: ECDSA Secp256r1 Public Key generated and locked by the mobile Secure Enclave/TPM 2.0

status.description: Current network routing and deployment status

vanguard_trust_score_vts.description: Deterministic trust score governing Elite/Standard routing prioritization

hardware_attestation.description: Verified specifications of the Agent's mobile edge node

uwb_certified.description: True if equipped with an approved Time-of-Flight UWB radio for precision homing

sector_assignments.description: Approved Level-6 Geohash sectors where the Agent is authorized for dispatch

verified_credentials.description: On-chain hashes of physical onboarding documents and SOP certifications
